title: 9 Herbal Creams For Stiff Neck
description: Mentha x piperita creams contains a combination of active constituents, including menthone, menthol, and limonene. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling in the neck and surrounding muscles. Menthone and menthol also have analgesic and antispasmodic properties, making them effective in easing pain and stiffness.
